Building Partnerships Across Continents

About Us

TRAYA International Exim LLP is a dynamic and globally oriented export-import company committed to delivering premium-quality agricultural and food processing products from India to international markets. Inspired by the vision of building strong and lasting partnerships across continents, we serve as a trusted bridge between Indian manufacturers and global buyers, ensuring excellence, consistency, and reliability in every shipment.

With a strong focus on quality, transparency, and customer satisfaction, TRAYA International Exim LLP specializes in the sourcing, processing, and export of dehydrated vegetables and value-added food ingredients. Our extensive product portfolio includes dehydrated garlic, dehydrated onion, and fried onion products, carefully processed using advanced dehydration techniques to preserve their natural flavor, aroma, nutritional value, and shelf life. We work closely with certified production facilities and quality-controlled supply chains to ensure that every product meets international food safety standards and customer specifications.

Building Partnerships Across Continents

Our Mission

  • To deliver premium-quality dehydrated garlic, onion, and fried onion products to customers worldwide.
  • To promote Indian agricultural excellence in global markets through reliable export solutions.
  • To maintain the highest standards of quality, food safety, and consistency in every product we supply.
  • To build long-term relationships based on trust, transparency, and mutual growth.
  • To ensure timely deliveries and seamless international trade operations.
  • To provide customized product specifications and packaging solutions that meet diverse customer requirements.
  • To continuously improve our processes through innovation, efficiency, and sustainable business practices.

Building Partnerships Across Continents

Our Vision

To become a globally recognized leader in the export of premium-quality dehydrated food ingredients, known for excellence, reliability, and innovation. We aspire to build a strong international presence by connecting the finest agricultural products of India with food industries and consumers across the world, creating lasting value through quality-driven trade partnerships.

Building Partnerships Across Continents

Why Choose Us?

Premium Quality Products with stringent quality control.

Consistent Supply Chain and reliable sourcing network.

International Standard Packaging and food safety compliance.

Competitive Pricing without compromising quality.

Timely Shipment and efficient logistics management.

Customized Product Specifications as per buyer requirements.

Customer-Centric Approach focused on long-term partnerships.

Professional Export Documentation and support.

Global Market Understanding and trade expertise.

Commitment to Trust, Transparency, and Excellence.
